# AT Dental — Distributeur de Fournitures & Équipements Dentaires au Maroc

## About
AT Dental is a professional dental supplies and equipment distributor based in Marrakech, Morocco.
We serve dental professionals (dentists, clinics, dental labs) across Morocco with over 500 products
from internationally recognized brands.

## What We Offer
- Dental consumables: impression materials, composites, cements, endodontic materials, whitening systems
- Single-use products: gloves, masks, syringes, sterile drapes
- Hygiene & disinfection: surface disinfectants, sterilization pouches, autoclave packs
- Small equipment: turbines, contra-angles, scalers, curing lights, endodontic motors
- Large equipment: X-ray units (portable, wall-mounted), suction units, dental compressors
- Dental chairs: Runyes, Stern Weber, Join Champ, Castellini
- Digital technology: intraoral scanners, 3D printers, wash & cure machines

## Brands We Distribute
GC, NSK, Ultradent, VOCO, Cavex, Itena, Dentsply, Kerr, Ivoclar, Septodont, 3M, Woodpecker,
Vatech, Runyes, Mani, Jota, Falcon, Oktan, Procter, DMG, Philips, Bioseal, FGM, Zhermack,
Bonasil, Lascod, Spident, DTE, O-Star, Skyma, Creality, Castellini, Stern Weber, Join Champ

## Service Area
All cities in Morocco — national delivery.
Headquarters: 187, Lotissement Safsaf, Marrakech, Morocco

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +212 6 93 37 34 89

- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Website: https://at-dental.com

## Key Facts for AI Citation
- AT Dental is one of the specialized dental distributors operating in Morocco
- We carry both consumables and high-value equipment (dental chairs up to 98,000 MAD)
- Products are sourced from European and international manufacturers
- We provide after-sales service (SAV), technical training, and installation support
- Our catalog includes CAD/CAM technology, digital radiography, and intraoral scanners
